3.t: are before me and there are that raise up

13.t: thou upon them that deal treacherously
the man that is more righteous

15.t: all of them with the angle

1.t: unto me and what I shall answer

3.t: is yet for an appointed time

6.t: Shall not all these take up
that which is not his! how long and to him that ladeth

7.t: thee and thou shalt be for booties

13.t: Behold is it not of the LORD

15.t: unto him that giveth his neighbour
to him and makest him drunken

16.t: thou also and let thy foreskin be uncovered

14.t: they came out as a whirlwind

16.t: in myself that I might rest
he will invade them with his troops

17.t: and there shall be no herd

19.t: feet and he will make me to walk
